def positive_repeated_stat_or_exists_calls_before_single_followup_operation():
    rule_id = "repeated_stat_or_exists_calls_before_single_followup_operation"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag paths that perform duplicate filesystem checks before one operation."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
